name: fofa-network-space-mapper
description: OctoBus package for FOFA network space mapping engine - search for internet assets, devices, and services. Supports asset discovery, attack surface enumeration, vulnerability assessment, and statistical aggregation.

FOFA.FOFA/Search.name: search
FOFA.FOFA/Search.description: Search FOFA network space for assets matching query syntax.

FOFA.FOFA/GetHost.name: get-host
FOFA.FOFA/GetHost.description: Get detailed host information from FOFA including ports, services, banners, and certificates.

FOFA.FOFA/GetAccountInfo.name: get-account-info
FOFA.FOFA/GetAccountInfo.description: Get FOFA account information including user stats, VIP level, and API usage quota.

FOFA.FOFA/GetStats.name: get-stats
FOFA.FOFA/GetStats.description: Get statistical aggregation of FOFA search results - count by protocol, port, country, etc.
